summary: Iteration 12 - Navigation Bug Fixes Testing. All 3 critical UI/UX navigation bugs fixed and verified: (1) Back to dashboard from other pages via Home tab, (2) Profile button dropdown working, (3) Account button in Settings working. All 15 tests passed (100%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified all navigation bug fixes: (1) Bottom nav has 6 tabs - Home, Chat, Agents, CRM, Analytics, Settings. Home tab navigates to /dashboard. (2) Profile avatar (gold button top-right) opens dropdown with Edit Profile, Billing & Plan, Sign Out. (3) Edit Profile navigates to /settings and auto-opens Account panel. (4) Billing & Plan navigates to /pricing. (5) Sign Out logs out and redirects to landing page. (6) Settings page profile card opens Account panel with Full Name, Company, Email fields and Save button. (7) Account menu in Settings also opens Account panel. (8) Billing menu in Settings navigates to /pricing. (9) Connect Your Channels menu navigates to /settings/channels. All test-ids working: profile-menu-btn, profile-dropdown, profile-edit-btn, profile-billing-btn, profile-logout-btn, profile-card, account-panel, account-close-btn, account-name-input, account-company-input, account-save-btn, logout-btn, nav-dashboard, nav-chat, nav-agents, nav-crm, nav-analytics, nav-settings, bottom-nav.

profile_dropdown.edit_profile_action: Navigate to /settings with Account panel open
profile_dropdown.signout_action: Logout and redirect to landing page

settings_page.account_panel: Full Name, Company, Email (disabled), Save button, Close button

bugs_fixed: Bug 1: No way to go back to dashboard from other pages - FIXED (Home tab in bottom nav)
Bug 2: Profile button doesn't work - FIXED (Opens dropdown with Edit Profile, Billing, Sign Out)
Bug 3: Account button in Settings doesn't work - FIXED (Opens Account panel for profile editing)
